body: PT Modernland Realty Tbk (MDLN) has secured a USD 60 million loan facility from Eight Rubies Limited, arranged by PT Bank JTrust Indonesia Tbk, to support its asset divestment plan worth USD 200 million, which will be used to buy back notes due in 2025 and 2027. The company, which reported a loss of IDR 245.08 billion as of August 31, 2024, and IDR 101.97 billion in fiscal year 2023, aims to reduce its USD bond obligation and secure gains from this obligation fulfillment.
title: PT Modernland Realty secures USD 60 million loan facility to support asset divestment and debt reduction.

body: PT Mark Dynamics Tbk (MARK) will distribute an interim dividend of IDR 20 per share, totaling IDR 76 billion, for fiscal year 2024, following a 124.51% year-on-year profit surge in Q3 2024. The company's financial report for September 2024 showed a net profit of IDR 224.35 billion, unrestricted retained earnings of IDR 738.83 billion, and total equity of IDR 874.48 billion, significantly higher than the same period last year.
title: PT Mark Dynamics to Distribute IDR 76 Billion Interim Dividend for Fiscal Year 2024 After Profit Soars 124.51% Year-on-Year.

body: PT Newport Marine Services Tbk (NPMS) has set its initial public offering (IPO) price at IDR 100 per share, potentially raising IDR 100 billion from the IPO of 1 billion shares, with approximately USD 4.79 million or IDR 75 billion to be used to pay off loan principals and the rest for working capital. The public offering will take place from November 4-8, 2024, with electronic distribution on November 11 and listing on the Indonesia Stock Exchange on November 12, 2024.
title: PT Newport Marine Services sets IPO price at IDR 100 per share, aiming to raise IDR 100 billion.

body: PT Pelayaran Kurnia Lautan Semesta Tbk (KLAS) will distribute a stock dividend of IDR 51.96 billion, or 180.41 million shares, with a ratio of 12:1, meaning shareholders will receive 1 new share for every 12 existing shares. As of June 2024, KLAS had total assets of IDR 353.89 billion, cash and cash equivalents of IDR 86.4 billion, and total equity of IDR 215.47 billion.
title: PT Kurnia Lautan Semesta to Distribute Stock Dividend with 12:1 Ratio to Shareholders.

body: Penfabric Sdn Berhad (owned by Toray, Japan) is making a tender offer of IDR 28.88 billion for 72.22 million shares of PT Century Textile Industry Tbk (CNTX), representing 36.11% of its issued and paid-up capital, at a price of IDR 400 per share, 181.7% higher than the average price over the past 90 days. CNTX's financials show revenue of MYR 493.43 million, operating profit of MYR 2.27 million, and total assets of MYR 549.71 million, with the tender offer aimed at taking the company private following consecutive losses and inactivity in daily transactions.
title: Penfabric allocates IDR 28.88 billion for tender offer of 72.22 million shares of PT Century Textile Industry to take the company private.

body: PT Budi Starch & Sweetener Tbk (BUDI) will distribute an interim dividend of IDR 22.49 billion, with the payment set for December 5, 2024, following approval from the board of commissioners on November 1, 2024. As of September 30, 2024, the company reported a net profit of IDR 41.04 billion, retained earnings of IDR 590.15 billion, and total equity of IDR 1.63 trillion, despite its stock price weakening 1.71% to IDR 230 per share.
title: Budi Starch & Sweetener to Distribute IDR 22.49 Billion Interim Dividend to Shareholders

body: The Indonesian government will hold an auction for 7 series of government securities or state sukuk next Tuesday, targeting IDR 9 trillion, with yields ranging from 4.87% to 6.87% per annum. Since the beginning of 2024, the government has conducted 21 state sukuk auctions, accumulating IDR 187.62 trillion in awarded amounts.
title: Indonesian Government to Hold Auction for 7 Series of Government Securities Worth IDR 9 Trillion Next Tuesday

body: PT Tunas Baru Lampung Tbk (TBLa) is allocating an interim dividend of IDR 35 per share, or IDR 210.88 billion, for fiscal year 2024, following a 14.97% year-over-year increase in net profit at the end of Q3 2024. The company reported a 5.2% year-over-year growth in revenue to IDR 12.48 trillion, although its gross profit margin slipped to 16.45% from 18.19%.
title: PT Tunas Baru Lampung Allocates IDR 210.88 Billion in Interim Dividend for Fiscal Year 2024.

body: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk (INKP) reported a 10% decline in revenue and a 29.53% drop in net profit year-on-year at the end of Q3 2024, with revenue slipping to USD 2.42 billion and net profit shrinking to USD 226.10 million. The decline was mainly due to weakened export sales, particularly in the Asian market, which accounted for 68% of total export sales, with a value of USD 899.23 million.
title: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper's revenue and net profit decline in Q3 2024 due to weakened export sales, particularly in the Asian market.

body: PT Pelayaran Bina Buana Raya Tbk (BBRM) is expanding its fleet by acquiring an anchor handling tug supply vessel for USD 12.1 million, which will increase its revenue and become a main source of income, with the company projecting a net profit increase of USD 5.83 million. The purchase will be made in installments, with a 10% deposit upfront and the remaining payment to be made gradually, with the vessel handover expected to take place 390 days after the contract signing.
title: PT Pelayaran Bina Buana Raya to Expand Fleet with USD 12.1 Million Anchor Handling Tug Supply Vessel Acquisition
